---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new scanner rule, capability, or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the context and motivation clearly.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed? Be as specific as you can — include example code, command-line flags, or output format if applicable.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to solve this problem? Why is the proposed solution better?

## OWASP LLM Top 10 category (if applicable)

Does this feature relate to a specific [OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025)](https://owasp.org/www-project-top-10-for-large-language-model-applications/) category? If yes, which one?

- [ ] LLM01: Prompt Injection
- [ ] LLM02: Sensitive Information Disclosure
- [ ] LLM03: Supply Chain
- [ ] LLM04: Data and Model Poisoning
- [ ] LLM05: Improper Output Handling
- [ ] LLM06: Excessive Agency
- [ ] LLM07: System Prompt Leakage
- [ ] LLM08: Vector and Embedding Weaknesses
- [ ] LLM09: Misinformation
- [ ] LLM10: Unbounded Consumption
- [ ] Not applicable / General improvement

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or examples that support this request.
